\tzpentry{ID4052}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4052 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$p(R+f(x))R\textbackslash\_\{\text\{T\}\}=\textbackslash lim\_\{x\to p\} (R + f(x))R\_T=limx$
\]
